attempts.agent_commands:
maxCount = getRuntimeContext().getState(
                                new ValueStateDescriptor<>("maxCount", Long.class));
                        finished = getRuntimeContext().getState(
                                new ValueStateDescriptor<>("finished", Boolean.class));
                    }

                    @Override
                    public void processElement(Tuple2<Long, Long> value,
                                               Context ctx,
                                               Collector<Tuple2<Long, Long>> out) throws Exception {
                        if (value.f1 == -1L) {
                            finished.update(true);
                        } else {
                            Long cur = maxCount.value();
                            if (cur == null || value.f1 > cur) {
                                maxCount.update(value.f1);
                            }
                        }
                        Boolean fin = finished.value();
                        Long mc = maxCount.value();
                        if (fin != null && fin && mc != null) {
                            ctx.timerService().registerEventTimeTimer(Long.MAX_VALUE - 1);
                        }
                    }

                    @Override
                    public void onTimer(long timestamp, OnTimerContext ctx,
                                        Collector<Tuple2<Long, Long>> out) throws Exception {
                        Boolean fin = finished.value();
                        Long mc = maxCount.value();
                        if (fin != null && fin && mc != null) {
                            out.collect(new Tuple2<>(ctx.getCurrentKey(), mc));
                        }
                    }
                });

        result.writeAsText(outputPath, FileSystem.WriteMode.OVERWRITE).setParallelism(1);

        env.execute("LongestSessionPerJob");
    }
}
JAVAEOF
echo "Wrote LongestSessionPerJob.java"'
/bin/bash -lc "rm -f /app/workspace/out.txt && cd /opt/flink/bin && ./flink run -t local \\
  -c clusterdata.query.LongestSessionPerJob \\
  /app/workspace/target/LongestSessionPerJob-jar-with-dependencies.jar \\
  --task_input /app/workspace/data/task_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz \\
  --job_input /app/workspace/data/job_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz \\
  --output /app/workspace/out.txt 2>&1"
wc -l /app/workspace/out.txt && head -30 /app/workspace/out.txt
/bin/bash -lc "# Count finished jobs in job events
zcat /app/workspace/data/job_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F, '"'$4==4'"' | wc -l"
/bin/bash -lc "# Count unique finished job IDs
zcat /app/workspace/data/job_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F, '"'$4==4 {print $3}'"' | sort -u | wc -l"
/bin/bash -lc "# Count unique job IDs with SUBMIT task events
zcat /app/workspace/data/task_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F, '"'$6==0 {print $3}'"' | sort -u | wc -l"
/bin/bash -lc "# Jobs that have FINISH event AND have SUBMIT task events
comm -12 \\
  <(zcat /app/workspace/data/task_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F, '"'$6==0 {print $3}'"' | sort -u) \\
  <(zcat /app/workspace/data/job_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F, '"'$4==4 {print $3}'"' | sort -u) \\
  | wc -l"
/bin/bash -lc "# Check job 6252020836 which has count 9 - look at its SUBMIT task events
zcat /app/workspace/data/task_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F, '"'$3==6252020836 && $6==0 {print $1, $3, $4, $6}'"' | sort -n"
/bin/bash -lc "# Find jobs with many SUBMIT events to check session splitting
zcat /app/workspace/data/task_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F, '"'$6==0 {print $3}'"' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -10"
/bin/bash -lc "# Check if job 6252026869 is finished
zcat /app/workspace/data/job_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F, '"'$3==6252026869 && $4==4'"'"
/bin/bash -lc "# Check timestamps of SUBMIT events for job 6252026869 to see sessions
zcat /app/workspace/data/task_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F, '"'$3==6252026869 && $6==0 {print $1}'"' | sort -n | head -20"
/bin/bash -lc '# Check our output for this job
grep "6252026869" /app/workspace/out.txt'
/bin/bash -lc "# Find a finished job with many SUBMIT events
comm -12 \\
  <(zcat /app/workspace/data/task_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F, '"'$6==0 {print $3}'"' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | awk '"'$1>5 {print $2}'"' | sort) \\
  <(zcat /app/workspace/data/job_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F, '"'$4==4 {print $3}'"' | sort -u) | head -5"
/bin/bash -lc "# Check timestamps for job 6252041748 SUBMIT events
zcat /app/workspace/data/task_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F, '"'$3==6252041748 && $6==0 {print $1}'"' | sort -n"
/bin/bash -lc '# Check output for this job
grep "6252041748" /app/workspace/out.txt'
/bin/bash -lc "# Check job 6252020745 which has count 2
zcat /app/workspace/data/task_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F, '"'$3==6252020745 && $6==0 {print $1}'"' | sort -n"
/bin/bash -lc '# Check output for this job
grep "6252020745" /app/workspace/out.txt'
/bin/bash -lc '# Find finished jobs where SUBMIT timestamps span more than 10 min (600000000 microseconds)
# Check the time range of SUBMIT events per finished job
for jobid in $(comm -12 '"\\
  <(zcat /app/workspace/data/task_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F, '"'$6==0 {print $3}'"' | sort -u) \\
  <(zcat /app/workspace/data/job_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F, '"'$4==4 {print $3}'"' | sort -u) | head -100); do
  range="'$(zcat /app/workspace/data/task_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F, -v j="$jobid" '"'"'$3==j && $6==0 {print $1}'"' | sort -n | awk 'NR==1{min="'$1} {max=$1} END{print max-min}'"')
  if [ \""'$range" -gt 600000000 ] 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "Job $jobid range: $range"
  fi
done'
/bin/bash -lc '# Check all finished jobs for multi-session behavior
for jobid in $(comm -12 '"\\
  <(zcat /app/workspace/data/task_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F, '"'$6==0 {print $3}'"' | sort -u) \\
  <(zcat /app/workspace/data/job_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F, '"'$4==4 {print $3}'"' | sort -u)); do
  range="'$(zcat /app/workspace/data/task_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F, -v j="$jobid" '"'"'$3==j && $6==0 {print $1}'"' | sort -n | awk 'NR==1{min="'$1} {max=$1} END{print max-min}'"')
  if [ \""'$range" -gt 600000000 ] 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "Job $jobid range: $range"
  fi
done'
/bin/bash -lc "# Verify: count SUBMIT events per finished job and compare with output
zcat /app/workspace/data/task_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F, '"'$6==0 {print $3}'"' | sort | uniq -c | awk '{print \"(\""'$2","$1")"}'"' | sort > /tmp/expected_counts.txt

# Get finished job IDs
zcat /app/workspace/data/job_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz | awk -F, '"'$4==4 {print $3}'"' | sort -u > /tmp/finished_jobs.txt

# Filter expected to only finished jobs
while read line; do
  jobid="'$(echo "$line" | sed '"'s/(\\(["'^,]*'"\\),.*/\\1/')
  if grep -q \""'^${jobid}$" /tmp/finished_jobs.txt; then
    echo "$line"
  fi
done < /tmp/expected_counts.txt | sort > /tmp/expected_filtered.txt

sort /app/workspace/out.txt > /tmp/actual_sorted.txt

diff /tmp/expected_filtered.txt /tmp/actual_sorted.txt | head -20'
/bin/bash -lc '# Verify the output format matches expected tuple format
head -5 /app/workspace/out.txt
echo "---"
tail -5 /app/workspace/out.txt
echo "---"
# Check no empty lines
grep -c "''^$" /app/workspace/out.txt || echo "No empty lines"'
cd /app/workspace && mvn clean package -q 2>&1 && echo "BUILD OK"
/bin/bash -lc "rm -f /app/workspace/out.txt && cd /opt/flink/bin && ./flink run -t local \\
  -c clusterdata.query.LongestSessionPerJob \\
  /app/workspace/target/LongestSessionPerJob-jar-with-dependencies.jar \\
  --task_input /app/workspace/data/task_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz \\
  --job_input /app/workspace/data/job_events/part-00001-of-00500.csv.gz \\
  --output /app/workspace/out.txt 2>&1 && echo \"RUN OK\""
